subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Today countless myriads of human beings are gathered upon this dust-laden earth, and night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله الیوم هزاران کرور بشر در بسیط تراب اغبر محشور و شب
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcending the material condition, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
